summary: Magical 1974 show with stellar jams and a standout Jack Straw/One More Saturday Night, but the Wall‑of‑Sound board mix is only fair and lacks an audience track.
review: Fans rave about the energy of this night – the second set kicking off with a ripping Jack Straw and closing on a thunderous One More Saturday Night – making it a truly magical performance. The soundboard recording, however, suffers from muffled drums, noise‑cancelling mic artifacts and no audience feed, and Sugar Magnolia is missing entirely from the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is praised highly while recording quality is noted as subpar; combined weighted score yields an overall ~4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board mix described as average with noise‑cancelling mics that dull musicality, drums buried in the mix, no audience track, and Sugar Magnolia missing from the recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set was short due to Wall of Sound technical issues; second set opened strong with Jack Straw and built to a climactic One More Saturday Night, delivering an overall magical night.
